description:
Asynchronously bulk create workflow instances for a list of company-level items. If an active instance already exists for an item, a failure will be returned for that item.

The returned async operation id can be used to query for status using the [`GET /rest/v2.0/companies/{company_id}/async_operations/{operation_id}`](https://developers.procore.com/reference/rest/operations?version=latest#get-operation-details) API. The result field of the operation contains a list of completed and failed i...

tool_type.description: Tool that instances are being created for.

tool_subtype.description: Tool sub-type. Only required for specific tools.

items.description: List of objects to create workflow instances for.

item_id.description: ID of the item to create the workflow for.

preset_id.description: ID of the workflow configuration to use when creating the workflow.
